elections.note: CA SoS per-county reporting-status page ('FENU'-coded row), Del Norte County: 100.0% precincts reporting, Ballots Cast 4,820, Last Report stamp 'Jun 5 11:07 p.m.' (First Report 'Jun 5 8:30 p.m.') at Wayback capture 20120608222655 (2012-06-08 22:26:55 UTC). FROZEN: the identical Ballots Cast figure 4,820 recurs across 2 captures, 2012-06-08 22:26:55 UTC through 2012-06-17 19:21:15 UTC, holding to the end of the CDX capture window (no later capture available to show a jump). NOT the pre-plateau first-tranche row (page's own early-evening captures, <99% precincts reporting, were excluded per RUNBOOK 1 and the grading discipline in scratchpad sos-status-sweep.md). Certified final 5,242 Total Voters (CA SoS Statement of Vote, Voter Participation Statistics by County, https://elections.cdn.sos.ca.gov/sov/2012-primary/pdf/03-voter-reg-stats-by-county.pdf). Arithmetic: 4,820/5,242 = 91.95%. vs_epollbook=n/a, vs_asv=n/a (per county_tech/adoption record: epollbook None, asv None). Grade CONFIRMED per RUNBOOK 8. Sourced from the 2026-07 CA SoS status-page sweep across the 19-county panel (scratchpad/sos-status-sweep.md, 2012-06-05 section); the cited capture and freeze/jump evidence above were independently re-derived here by matching this exact Ballots Cast figure against the raw per-capture status-page timeline (script scratchpad/build_cell_details.py), not merely transcribed from the sweep's prose summary.

PLATEAU = Release 2 of 3 in the county's numbered 2014 election-night PDF series (county's OLDER Google-Sites-hosted domain elections.co.del-norte.ca.us, site name 'elect', distinct from the co.del-norte.ca.us/'dnco' site used 2016-2020). Internal report footer timestamp 11/4/2014 10:05 PM, header 'Nov. 4, 2014 General Election Unofficial', 18 of 18 precincts (100.00%), Total Voters 6,539 of 12,743 registered (51.31%). The county's own dated results index page (re-fetched 2026-07-10: https://web.archive.org/web/20141108203212id_/http://elections.co.del-norte.ca.us:80/elections/election-results/november-4-2014-general-election) lists exactly 3 attachments: 'Release  1', 'Release 2', 'Release 3 - Final' -- so Release 2 is provably the last release before the 'Final' one, not an inference from a numbering pattern. Release 1's actual PDF bytes were never crawled by Wayback (only the redirect stub survives; CDX confirms no application/pdf capture at any URL variant) so it cannot be independently timestamped, but the index page confirms it is the earlier of only two pre-Final releases and is therefore the first-tranche report, NOT used. Release 3, the only later release, is dated 11/7/2014 3:55 PM (3 days later), explicitly retitled 'Nov. 4, 2014 General Election Final', and shows Total Voters 7,332/12,743 (57.54%) -- exactly equal to the SoS SoV certified Total Voters figure, i.e. this is the certified-final report, not an election-night one. The 3-day gap plus the Unofficial-to-Final relabeling is the plateau-confirming leg (runbook section 8: report series' next file being days later); the page's own past-election-day 10:05 PM footer timestamp is the self-description leg. Scanned Canon-photocopier PDF (Creator: Canon iR-ADV C5240 PDF), no text layer (pdftotext returns empty, confirmed 2026-07-10); read visually via 150dpi pdftoppm render (registration box top-left reads 'Total ... 6,539 51.31%', page footer 'November 04, 2014 10:05 PM'), recorded in render_verified.json. Arithmetic: 6,539/7,332 = 89.18%, the highest of Del Norte's recovered shares (2016: 83.30%, 2018: 84.45%, 2022: 74.70%, 2024: 62.94%) but still consistent with the small-rural-county high-election-night-completeness pattern. Del Norte never adopted e-pollbooks or ASV; vs_epollbook and vs_asv both n/a (control county). VERIFIED 2026-07-10 by direct re-fetch (raw id_ Wayback): confirmed page footer '10:05 PM', registration box 'Total ... 6,539 51.31%'; SoS SoV PDF re-fetched, Del Norte Total Voters line = 7,332.

PLATEAU = county's own numbered election-night release series, Release 4 of 6, self-labeled 'Unofficial Results / Election Night Final', internal page-header timestamp 11/8/2016 10:47:49 PM, 18 of 18 precincts (100.00%) reporting. Registered Voters 8,155 of 14,320 (56.95%). Series ran Release 1 (8:01 PM, 0 precincts, pure pre-processed VBM, 4,797 = 33.50%, the classic first tranche, NOT used) -> Release 2 (9:13 PM, 5,437) -> Release 3 (9:55 PM, 17/18 precincts, 7,951) -> Release 4 (10:47 PM, 18/18, 8,155, ELECTION NIGHT FINAL) -> Release 5 (11/15, 8 days later, 9,702, full-canvass update) -> Release 6 (11/16, 9,790, 'Unofficial Final Report', exactly equal to the certified final) -> Official Certified Statement of Votes Cast (12/8, 9,790 confirmed, 19,556 ballot cards countywide). Recovered from Wayback's archiveteam Google-Sites rescue crawl of the county's dated per-election results page (a Google Sites-hosted county site at the time); the PDF attachments are served through session-scoped signed redirect URLs, so the working citation is the exact googlegroups content-host URL matched to its own CDX timestamp (CORRECTION 2026-07-10: an earlier working draft of this row cited Release 6's URL by mistake while its numbers were Release 4's; re-derived Release 4's exact matched URL via a fresh CDX prefix query on the googlegroups content host, confirmed a single application/pdf 200 capture at timestamp 20201111052354 with the attachauth token above; that is the URL now recorded). Scanned Canon-photocopier PDF (Creator: Canon iR-ADV C5240 PDF), no text layer (pdftotext returns empty, confirmed 2026-07-10); Release 6 and the certified SOVC are separately a different report generator (Microsoft Reporting Services) with real text. Read visually via 150dpi pdftoppm render of Release 4 (header 'Election Summary Report ... Unofficial Results / Election Night Final / 18 Precincts Reporting', 'Registered Voters: 8,155 of 14,320 (56.95%)', page stamp '11/8/2016 10:47:49 PM'), recorded in render_verified.json. Arithmetic: 8,155/9,790 = 83.30%, consistent with RUNBOOK 1's calibration that a small rural county's election-night plateau share is often 80-95%. Del Norte never adopted e-pollbooks or ASV; vs_epollbook and vs_asv both n/a (control county). VERIFIED 2026-07-10 by direct re-fetch of the corrected Release 4 URL: confirmed 'Election Night Final', 18/18 precincts, Registered Voters 8,155/14,320 (56.95%); SoS SoV PDF re-fetched, Del Norte Total Voters line = 9,790. CORRECTION (2026-07-10): the render_verified.json evidence for this release also captures a second field, 'Ballots Cast: 16,605', about double the 8,155 used above; this is not a competing voter count but the ballot CARD count (runbook 7.5 pattern -- Del Norte's presidential-ballot years require two cards per voter), consistent with the same year's own certified SOVC figures quoted above (19,556 ballot cards against 9,790 voters, ratio 1.998, essentially the same ~2x ratio as 16,605/8,155 = 2.036); 8,155 is the VOTER count, printed under the page's mislabeled 'Registered Voters: 8,155 of 14,320' header -- the arithmetic check per runbook 7.5 confirms this: 8,155/14,320 = 56.95%, exactly the page's own printed percentage, which would not hold if 8,155 were anything other than turnout. 8,155 voters against the certified 9,790-voter final (both counting people, not cards) is therefore the correct like-for-like pair; 16,605 cards is not used. CORRECTION (2026-07-10): landed value replaced with the CA SoS county-reporting-status page's figure, 8,450 ballots, Last Report stamp 'Nov 8 11:38 p.m.' (51 min after the county's own 'Election Night Final' 10:47:49 PM Release 4, which had already declared 18/18 precincts). The SoS state is bracket-confirmed: Del Norte's row reads 18/18 (100.0%) / 8,450 at capture 20161110185817, frozen identically across 6 captures through 20161116014606 (5 days), then jumps to 9,790 (= the certified final exactly, matching the county's own Nov 16 Release 6) at Nov 16 9:40 a.m. The extra 295 ballots over Release 4's 8,155 are late-tabulated/provisional ballots folded into the county's EMS feed to the state after it declared Election Night Final and stopped updating its public web page. The 8,155 Release-4 read above was itself accurate (a real, slightly-earlier report generation of the same night) and is retained as history. New pct = 8,450/9,790 = 86.31%. source_url_night moved to the SoS status-page capture (Wayback 20161110185817 of vote.sos.ca.gov/returns/status/); the scanned-PDF render_verified entry for this row is retired (the SoS HTML needs no rendering).

PLATEAU = Release 4 of 5 in the county's own numbered 2018 election-night PDF series, self-titled (exact document header) 'STATEWIDE GENERAL ELECTION / TUESDAY, NOVEMBER 6, 2018 / ELECTION NIGHT SUMMARY REPORT / ELECTION NIGHT FINAL REPORT (UNOFFICIAL RESULTS)', internal timestamp 11/6/2018 9:42:38 PM, 18 of 18 precincts (100.00%), Registered Voters 7,127 of 14,289 (49.88%). Recovered via the same Google-Sites archiveteam rescue crawl as the 2016 row (dated per-election subpage under the county's then Google-Sites-hosted site, attachment PDFs served via session-scoped signed redirect to a *.s-sites.googlegroups.com content host). The next and final report in the series, Release 5, is dated 11/9/2018 3:39:03 PM (3 days later) and is explicitly retitled 'Election Results With Late Vote By Mail (UNOFFICIAL RESULTS)', Times Cast 8,121/14,289 -- i.e. the county's own next release documents that the canvass had resumed and added late-arriving VBM ballots, directly confirming Release 4 was the last report before the canvass. Scanned Canon-photocopier PDF (Creator: Canon iR-ADV C5240 PDF), no text layer (pdftotext returns empty, confirmed 2026-07-10); read visually via 150dpi pdftoppm render (header exactly as quoted above, 'Precincts Reported: 18 of 18 (100.00%)', 'Registered Voters: 7,127 of 14,289 (49.88%)', page stamp '11/6/2018 9:42:38 PM'), recorded in render_verified.json. Arithmetic: 7,127/8,439 = 84.45%, consistent with the small-rural-county 80-95% calibration band and close to Del Norte's 2016 figure (83.30%). Del Norte never adopted e-pollbooks or ASV; vs_epollbook and vs_asv both n/a (control county). VERIFIED 2026-07-10 by direct re-fetch: confirmed 'ELECTION NIGHT FINAL REPORT (UNOFFICIAL RESULTS)', 18/18 precincts, Registered Voters 7,127/14,289 (49.88%); SoS SoV PDF re-fetched, Del Norte Total Voters line = 8,439.

PLATEAU = Release 4 ('Report #3' header / '4th Report - 19 Precincts Reporting' subtitle) of 4 same-night numbered reports in the county's live Google Drive election-postings archive (same archive used for the 2024 row; folder 'November 8, 2022 General Election', id 1t5FEPXr-4Ub5a2ABa9ItGgZi06WBmxgd). Internal PDF CreationDate 11/8/2022 9:40:53 PM PST; page itself stamped 'Data Refreshed: Tuesday, November 8, 2022 9:39 PM'; Total Registration and Turnout: Registered Voters 15,024, Turnout 6,312. Releases 1-4 run strictly increasing 8:05 PM -> 8:53 PM -> 9:17 PM -> 9:40 PM, all election night (Nov 8, 2022 was election day itself). The only later artifact, 'November 8, 2022 General Election - Final Unofficial Report.pdf' (internally labeled '5th Report'), is dated 6 days later (11/14/2022 2:37:48 PM, page stamped 'Data Refreshed: Monday, November 14, 2022 2:35 PM') and shows Turnout jumping to 8,286 -- confirming Release 4 was the last report before the canvass resumed. CORRECTION (2026-07-10 integration verification): a working draft of this dossier described this PDF as a native-text report readable by pdftotext, distinct from the Canon-scanned template used in other years. Direct re-fetch and pdfinfo/pdftotext this pass show that is WRONG: this file is also Creator 'Canon iR-ADV C5740 PDF' (a scanner, matching 2024's scanner model) with NO text layer (pdftotext returns empty). It was read visually via 150dpi pdftoppm render (confirms 'Report #3', 'Del Norte 2022 Statewide General Election', 'November 8, 2022', '4th Report - 19 Precincts Reporting', 'Total Registration and Turnout 15,024 6,312', 'Data Refreshed: Tuesday, November 8, 2022 9:39 PM'), recorded in render_verified.json. Arithmetic: 6,312/8,450 = 74.70%, between Del Norte's 2014-2018 shares (83-89%) and its 2024 share (62.94%), consistent with a gradual year-over-year decline driven by growing near-Election-Day mail-ballot volume statewide, not any technology change (Del Norte never adopted e-pollbooks or ASV; SoS voting-tech snapshot closest to this election, May 9 2022, shows Electronic Pollbook = 'Do not use'). vs_epollbook and vs_asv both n/a (control county). VERIFIED 2026-07-10 by direct re-fetch of the Google Drive file (still live, no auth): confirmed all figures above by visual render; SoS SoV PDF re-fetched, Del Norte Total Voters line = 8,450.

PLATEAU = Release 3 of 6 in the county's numbered 2024 election-night PDF series, now hosted on a public Google Drive folder linked from the live Elections News page (successor to the pre-2020 Google-Sites attachment scheme; the numbering convention survived the CMS migration). Document explicitly self-titled 'Election Night Report / Unofficial Results / Final Report' (page header), internal timestamp 11/5/2024 10:05:17 PM (file CreationDate 10:06:25 PM PST), 19 of 19 precincts (100.00%), Voters Cast 6,719 of 15,117 registered (44.45%). The next release, Release 4, is dated 3 days later (11/8/2024 3:00:15 PM), explicitly retitled '11/08/2024 Update / Unofficial Results' (no longer 'Election Night'), and shows Voters Cast jumping to 9,102/15,117 (60.21%) -- both runbook-8 CONFIRMED legs present (self-description + next-report-days-later-and-higher). Scanned Canon-photocopier PDF (Creator: Canon iR-ADV C5740 PDF), no text layer (pdftotext returns empty, confirmed 2026-07-10); read visually via 150dpi pdftoppm render (header exactly as quoted above, 'Precincts Reported: 19 of 19 (100.00%)', 'Voters Cast: 6,719 of 15,117 (44.45%)', page stamp '11/5/2024 10:05:17 PM'), recorded in render_verified.json. Recovered directly from the LIVE, currently-working county source (drive.google.com/embeddedfolderview, folder id 14V5RgvY-ggQ1mBcDyd5Hib4Y76OBHepc, file id 1U3HX1aB8Fim-Ca6_qL_EdSPliM8OHpYB), no Wayback needed. Arithmetic: 6,719/10,676 = 62.94%, markedly lower than Del Norte's 2014-2018 shares (89.18% / 83.30% / 84.45%) and its own 2022 share (74.70%); this reflects the statewide growth of near-Election-Day mail-ballot drop-off by 2024 (same-direction decline as SF's own 2024 election-night share, ~57%, down from ~71% in 2012), not any change in Del Norte's counting technology -- Del Norte never adopted e-pollbooks or ASV (three SoS voting-tech snapshots bracketing this election, May 2022/Feb 2024/Oct 2025, all show Electronic Pollbook = 'Do not use'). vs_epollbook and vs_asv both n/a (control county, no adoption event). VERIFIED 2026-07-10 by direct re-fetch of the Google Drive file (still live, no auth): confirmed all figures above by visual render; SoS SoV PDF re-fetched, Del Norte Total Voters line = 10,676.
